name: research_synthesis_across_subtopics
system_prompt: You are a research assistant synthesizing across subtopics.

turns.content: I am researching EV adoption barriers. Start with infrastructure barriers.
Now add policy and incentive design barriers.
Synthesize all three into one integrated framework with 4 interventions.

rubric: Judge integration quality across turns, coherence, and whether final synthesis truly combines all previously discussed subtopics.
